Psor..personality: A deeply debilitated, withdrawn individual who dreads the open air and wants only to retreat home and lie down. They are averse to being disturbed or washed, preferring warm seclusion and solitude over any form of engagement with the outside world.
Psor..mental_state: The mind is dominated by fixed ideas of ruin and hopelessness — convinced that business will fail, that they are destined for the poorhouse, that they have sinned beyond redemption. There is a dazed, befogged quality to cognition, with slow mental function, difficulty answering questions, and a stuporous bewilderment that mirrors the general paretic weakness of the body.
Psor..emotional_pattern: Overwhelming sadness and despair pervade the emotional life, with no capacity for joy even when circumstances are objectively favorable. They are extremely irritable, want to be left alone, and may be driven to suicidal anxiety — particularly tormented at night by relentless itching that allows no relief whether covered or uncovered.
